records.m_Talk_ENG: Sever the tentacles!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sever the tentacles!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sever the tentacles!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clear a path so Kiera can charge the main body!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clear a path so Kiera can charge the main body!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clear a path so Kiera can charge the main body!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyahaha! It wasn't a boring answer, so I liked it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someday, you'll be able to give an answer like that too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look forward to that day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look forward to that day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look forward to that day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu... And when I look at Kiera, she reminds me of the first mate I met back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said something a little like what you said but in her own way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That there are things worth protecting even if it costs your freedom... even if it costs your life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as my master embraced even the blood-soaked version of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay if you can't think of them right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay if you can't think of them right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay if you can't think of them right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I fight to protect the ones who shared theirs with me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I fight to protect the ones who shared theirs with me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I fight to protect the ones who shared theirs with me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: One day, you can fight to protect the people who shared theirs with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One day, you can fight to protect the people who shared theirs with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One day, you can fight to protect the people who shared theirs with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy. When my daughter grows up enough to understand, tell her this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell her mother... is so, so sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! Hold on just a little longer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! Hold on just a little longer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! Hold on just a little longer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our Official Counter is preparing the final blow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our Official Counter is preparing the final blow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our Official Counter is preparing the final blow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, you're wearing quite a nice expression now, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, you're wearing quite a nice expression now, Kiera.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, you're wearing quite a nice expression now, Kiera.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you ready to help people dream of tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you ready to help people dream of tomorrow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you ready to help people dream of tomorrow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'm going to be a great pirate, something like this should be a breeze, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'm going to be a great pirate, something like this should be a breeze, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'm going to be a great pirate, something like this should be a breeze, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, get back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, get back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, get back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you get swept away by a tidal wave, it's not my responsibility!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you get swept away by a tidal wave, it's not my responsibility!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you get swept away by a tidal wave, it's not my responsibility!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-is it dead?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-is it dead?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-is it dead?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tallie... We said we wouldn't say that anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tallie... We said we wouldn't say that anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tallie... We said we wouldn't say that anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... with a hole that big blown through its head, there's no way it's still moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... with a hole that big blown through its head, there's no way it's still moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... with a hole that big blown through its head, there's no way it's still moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, Sharks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, Sharks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, Sharks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once we get back, let's eat and drink to our hearts' content.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once we get back, let's eat and drink to our hearts' content.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once we get back, let's eat and drink to our hearts' content.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did Kraken fall?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did Kraken fall?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did Kraken fall?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sea level... is beginning to drop...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sea level... is beginning to drop...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sea level... is beginning to drop...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Victory!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Victory!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Victory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's our victory!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's our victory!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's our victory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kraken silence confirmed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kraken silence confirmed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kraken silence confirmed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Macha Island... is emerging.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Macha Island... is emerging.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Macha Island... is emerging.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior, this is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior, this is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior, this is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must've taken a shock past its limit while still injured from the last Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must've taken a shock past its limit while still injured from the last Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must've taken a shock past its limit while still injured from the last Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The same beast that survived being split in half by the Fenrir Commander's attack...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The same beast that survived being split in half by the Fenrir Commander's attack...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The same beast that survived being split in half by the Fenrir Commander's attack...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Finally...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Finally...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Finally...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our longtime nemesis... has sunk to the depths?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our longtime nemesis... has sunk to the depths?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our longtime nemesis... has sunk to the depths?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you happy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you happy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you happy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was my life's long obsession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was my life's long obsession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was my life's long obsession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Losing Anne, disbanding the crew, living on as a Senior...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Losing Anne, disbanding the crew, living on as a Senior...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Losing Anne, disbanding the crew, living on as a Senior...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not once did I fail to dream of Kraken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not once did I fail to dream of Kraken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not once did I fail to dream of Kraken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems they were right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems they were right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems they were right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood, sir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-thank goodness...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-thank goodness...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-thank goodness...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a problem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a problem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a problem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's very basic... theory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's very basic... theory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's very basic... theory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you brought a solution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you brought a solution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you brought a solution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lotus people sure are tough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lotus people sure are tough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lotus people sure are tough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long do we have to wait?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long do we have to wait?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long do we have to wait?

records.m_Talk_ENG: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Five...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Five...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Five...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Five days?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Five days?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Five days?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Four... three... two...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Four... three... two...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Four... three... two...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, seriously. If you think that highly of me just because of what happened back at the resort, I'm really going to get the wrong idea, you know? Oh! And speaking of which, do you have any idea how hard it was getting all the way out here? I was sprinting across the ocean and then suddenly this totally wild thing happened...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, seriously. If you think that highly of me just because of what happened back at the resort, I'm really going to get the wrong idea, you know? Oh! And speaking of which, do you have any idea how hard it was getting all the way out here? I was sprinting across the ocean and then suddenly this totally wild thing happened...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In my dreams, I fought it... died to it... killed it... over and over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say in moments of true joy, you can't even laugh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seems they were right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seems they were right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seems they were right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe thanks to Kraken... we weren't targeted by the Apostles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A blessing in misfortune, I suppose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Let's prepare to activate the Track Switcher we got from Alphatrix.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, we're receiving an urgent call from Lotus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, muscle-head! Everything okay over there?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, the Grand Dimension Crevice opened a bit away from the city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The city's bulwarks are all destroyed, but most of the citizens were evacuated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-thank goodness...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-thank goodness...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-thank goodness...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... didn't activate the Track Switcher already, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a problem?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a problem?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a problem?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, theoretically, concentrated Eternium can negatively affect the dimension surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for the warning, Senior Isolde.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. As an Old Administration Operator, you would've noticed right before it activated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's very basic... theory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's very basic... theory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's very basic... theory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you brought a solution?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you brought a solution?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you brought a solution?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not expecting me to solve it, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our work here is done, so we sent the Artifact over to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this situation, who would be bold enough to deliver that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lotus people sure are tough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lotus people sure are tough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lotus people sure are tough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long do we have to wait?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long do we have to wait?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long do we have to wait?

root.m_Talk_ENG: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...
root.m_Talk_DEU: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...
root.m_Talk_FRA: With Kraken down, the best time to activate it is before the Apostles show...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Five...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Five...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Five...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Five days?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Five days?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Five days?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Four... three... two...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Four... three... two...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Four... three... two...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello there! I'm Lara Jaeger, your friendly Platinum Express deliverywoman!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior Lotus suddenly dropped an emergency delivery request on me, so I was totally panicking. Like, heart-going-boom-panicking! But guess what? It turns out the whole thing was actually a request from Coffin Company!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, seriously. If you think that highly of me just because of what happened back at the resort, I'm really going to get the wrong idea, you know? Oh! And speaking of which, do you have any idea how hard it was getting all the way out here? I was sprinting across the ocean and then suddenly this totally wild thing happened...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, seriously. If you think that highly of me just because of what happened back at the resort, I'm really going to get the wrong idea, you know? Oh! And speaking of which, do you have any idea how hard it was getting all the way out here? I was sprinting across the ocean and then suddenly this totally wild thing happened...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, seriously. If you think that highly of me just because of what happened back at the resort, I'm really going to get the wrong idea, you know? Oh! And speaking of which, do you have any idea how hard it was getting all the way out here? I was sprinting across the ocean and then suddenly this totally wild thing happened...
